description: This is a modern platform bed featuring a dark wood finish with a prominent wood grain texture. The bed frame is low-profile, giving it a minimalist look, and includes an integrated headboard that extends horizontally. The headboard has two horizontal silver-toned decorative strips, adding a touch of contemporary flair. A single floating nightstand with a drawer and a metal handle is attached to the right side of the headboard. The bed is furnished with a white mattress and white pillows, covered by a light gray throw blanket draped across the foot of the bed. The overall design emphasizes clean lines and functional elegance.
